name: Robot Shop on EKS — Full-Stack New Relic
description: Kubernetes, robot-shop APM & traces, Claude AI Monitoring, and logs. Cluster: robot-shop-eks.

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT uniqueCount(podName) FROM K8sPodSample WHERE clusterName = 'robot-shop-eks' FACET deploymentName SINCE 30 minutes ago
SELECT average(cpuUsedCores / cpuLimitCores * 100) FROM K8sNodeSample WHERE clusterName = 'robot-shop-eks' FACET nodeName TIMESERIES SINCE 30 minutes ago
SELECT max(restartCount) FROM K8sContainerSample WHERE clusterName = 'robot-shop-eks' FACET podName, containerName SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 20
SELECT average(memoryWorkingSetBytes/1e6) AS 'MB' FROM K8sContainerSample WHERE clusterName = 'robot-shop-eks' FACET podName TIMESERIES SINCE 30 minutes ago
SELECT reason, message, `metadata.name` FROM InfrastructureEvent WHERE clusterName = 'robot-shop-eks' SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 30
SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) FROM Span WHERE span.kind IN ('server','consumer') FACET service.name TIMESERIES SINCE 30 minutes ago
SELECT percentile(duration.ms, 95) FROM Span WHERE span.kind = 'server' FACET service.name TIMESERIES SINCE 30 minutes ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE otel.status_code = 'ERROR') FROM Span WHERE span.kind = 'server' FACET service.name TIMESERIES SINCE 30 minutes ago
SELECT average(duration.ms), count(*) FROM Span WHERE span.kind = 'client' FACET service.name, name SINCE 30 minutes ago LIMIT 20
SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) FROM LlmChatCompletionSummary FACET response.model TIMESERIES SINCE 30 minutes ago
SELECT sum(response.usage.total_tokens) FROM LlmChatCompletionSummary FACET response.model SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT sum(response.usage.prompt_tokens)/1e6*0.15 + sum(response.usage.completion_tokens)/1e6*0.60 AS 'USD' FROM LlmChatCompletionSummary SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT percentile(duration, 95)*1000 FROM LlmChatCompletionSummary FACET response.model TIMESERIES SINCE 30 minutes ago
SELECT content FROM LlmChatCompletionMessage SINCE 30 minutes ago LIMIT 20
SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE cluster_name = 'robot-shop-eks' FACET pod_name TIMESERIES SINCE 30 minutes ago LIMIT 20
SELECT message, pod_name, container_name FROM Log WHERE cluster_name = 'robot-shop-eks' AND (level = 'error' OR message LIKE '%error%' OR message LIKE '%Exception%') SINCE 30 minutes ago LIMIT 50
